installCommand: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
buildCommand: npm run prisma:generate --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: https:; connect-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'self'; object-src 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(), payment=(), usb=(), bluetooth=()
